path: Problem: Return related fields (e.g., ID and unit) based on a user-entered text key in another table row
Action: Use INDEX+MATCH to look up a value by exact match on a description column; wrap with IFERROR to return blank when not found or when input is empty
Observation: Exact-match MATCH works when the entered description matches a unique key in the source list; IFERROR prevents #N/A and supports empty-string output for blank/unmatched inputs
